Pemasok Lokal Jumlah Pemasok 74 52 47 Local Supplier Number of Supplier B. Pemberdayaan Ekonomi Lokal Local Economic Empowerment ● Mitra Rata-rata (Kg/Ha) 25.650,01 14.583,28 22.911,73 Partners Average (Kg/Ha) ● Arpan Rata-rata (Kg/Ha) 4.303,29 10.401,38 6.081,42 Arpan Average (Kg/Ha) *) disajikan Kembali *) as Restated PRODUK RAMAH LINGKUNGAN ECO-FRIENDLY PRODUCTS Sebagai bagian dari komitmen Perseroan terhadap keberlanjutan, As part of the Company’s commitment to sustainability, the Perseroan menggunakan kemasan botol kaca yang lebih ramah Company uses more environmentally friendly glass bottle lingkungan dengan berbagai manfaat. Dengan mengurangi packaging with various benefits. By reducing the use of single- penggunaan kemasan sekali pakai, Perseroan berupaya use packaging, the Company seeks to reduce plastic waste and menekan limbah plastik dan mendukung ekonomi sirkular support the circular economy through a bottle return program melalui program pengembalian botol yang melibatkan pemulung, that involves scavengers, outlets and customers. Returned outlet, dan pelanggan. Botol yang dikembalikan akan dibersihkan bottles are cleaned using a specialized washing machine menggunakan mesin pencuci khusus untuk memastikan kualitas to ensure their quality and cleanliness before being reused. dan kebersihannya sebelum digunakan kembali. Laporan Keberlanjutan | 2024 | Sustainability Report 13 PT HATTEN BALI Tbk Strategi Keberlanjutan Ikhtisar Kinerja Keberlanjutan Profil Perusahaan Sustainability Strategy Sustainability Performance Highlights Company Profile Laporan Direksi Tentang Laporan Keberlanjutan Kinerja Ekonomi Board of Directors Report About the Sustainability Report Economic Performance Proses pencucian botol dimulai dengan memasukkan botol The bottle washing process starts with bringing new bottles or baru atau botol bekas hasil sortir gudang ke area cuci. Botol used bottles sorted by the warehouse to the washing area. The direndam dalam larutan hot caustic (2–2,5%) selama satu jam bottles are immersed in a hot caustic solution (2-2.5%) for one untuk melunakkan kotoran, lalu diangkat dan ditiriskan. Setelah hour to soften the dirt, then removed and drained. After that, itu, botol disikat bagian dalam dan luarnya, dibilas menggunakan the bottles are brushed inside and out, rinsed using citric acid larutan citric acid, kemudian dibilas lagi dengan air bersih. solution, and then rinsed again with clean water. The rinsed Botol yang telah dibilas ditempatkan dalam kerat dengan bottles were placed in a crate with the mouth of the bottle facing posisi mulut botol menghadap ke bawah untuk menghindari down to avoid contamination. The next process is then to check kontaminasi. Proses berikutnya kemudian dilakukan pengecekan the pH using litmus paper three times a day on the washing pH menggunakan kertas lakmus sebanyak tiga kali dalam sehari

evidence.shareholders: Shareholders tanggal 3 Juni 2024, para pemegang saham telah on June 3, 2024, the shareholders have approved menyetujui penegasan atas berakhirnya jabatan the confirmation of the termination of the position anggota Dewan Komisaris Independen Perseroan of the member of the Board of Independent dikarenakan meninggal dunia, dan selanjutnya para Commissioners of the Company due to his death, pemegang saham menyetujui penunjukan bapak and subsequently the shareholders approved the Tantowi Yahya sebagai Komisaris Independen appointment of Mr. Tantowi Yahya as the new Perseroan yang baru, terhitung sejak tanggal 3 Juni Independent Commissioner of the Company, 2024. Perubahan ini diaktakan dengan akta No. 2 effective June 3, 2024. This change is notarized tanggal 3 Juni 2024 oleh Luh Gede Herryani, S.H., by Deed No. 2 dated June 3, 2024, by Luh Gede M.Kn., Notaris di Badung-Bali. Telah mendapat Herryani, S.H., M.Kn., Notary at Badung-Bali. It pengesahan dari Menteri Hukum dan Hak Asasi has been approved by the Minister of Justice and Manusia Republik Indonesia No. AHU-AH.01.09- Human Rights of the Republic of Indonesia No. 0220888 tanggal 2 Juli 2024. Shareholders Composition in 6M 2025 to IDR 130.8 billion, supported by Bali tourism resilience. o Margin headwinds in 1H25: GPM at ~42% (vs. ~46% in 1H24) due to PT Gotama Putra 37.49% higher storage and procurement costs for imported grapes; NPM at ~13.7% (vs. ~17.0%). Ida Bagus Rai 37.50% o Catalysts for 2H25: Seasonal holiday demand, launch of Avara UOB KAY HIAN 7.25% premium line and Two Islands Ekko organic wine, and wider domestic Public market penetration. 17.76% o Long-term innovation pipeline: New alcoholic beverage categories 0% 50% 100% (brandy, gin, rum, cider, RTD) to diversify portfolio and capture emerging lifestyle trends. Financial Highlights In IDR Bn FY 2021 FY 2022 FY 2023 FY 2024 2025F 2026F Revenue 82.07 189.39 253.68 283.98 324.00 388.78 Net Profit -8.71 21.24 42.4 44.79 53.88 61.73 EBITDA 7.9 47.03 66.74 77.47 84.69 101.63 NPM -10.6% 11.2% 16.7% 15.8% 16.6% 14.6% GPM 45.21% 47.97% 45.64% 45.53% 46.4% 46.4% OPM 0.3% 21.9% 24.1% 24.6% 23.54% 23.54% ROE 21.27% -7.39% -7.05% 14.30% 15.89% 14.60% Interest Coverage Ratio 4.81 0.34 0.74 4.08 8.90 9.05 Source: Company and KSI Research www.kiwoom.co.id 1 KSI Research WINE – 1H25 Short Note Published on 8 Aug 2025 Business breakdown Published on 6 Aug 2025 PT Hatten Bali Tbk (WINE) is a pioneer in Indonesia’s local wine industry, rooted in a family business producing traditional Balinese beverages (Brem & Arak Bali) since 1968. The company entered the wine business in 1992 and officially launched its first product in 1994. WINE’s portfolio comprises 30 active Stock Keeping Units (SKUs), representing a diverse range of products across white, red, sparkling, and fortified wine categories. Moving forward, the number of SKUs is targeted to increase to 40, including the launch of premium and organic wine products. The company markets its products primarily to foreign tourists in Bali (especially from Australia and Europe), as well as to expatriate and local communities who are increasingly accustomed to consuming wine as part of their social lifestyle. Products & Brands Source: Company, KSI Research The company manages a diverse portfolio of brands catering to different market segments. Hatten Wines are produced from 100% locally grown Balinese grapes, showcasing the island’s unique terroir. Two Islands is crafted

Shareholders tanggal 3 Juni 2024, para pemegang saham telah on June 3, 2024, the shareholders have approved menyetujui penegasan atas berakhirnya jabatan the confirmation of the termination of the position anggota Dewan Komisaris Independen Perseroan of the member of the Board of Independent dikarenakan meninggal dunia, dan selanjutnya para Commissioners of the Company due to his death, pemegang saham menyetujui penunjukan bapak and subsequently the shareholders approved the Tantowi Yahya sebagai Komisaris Independen appointment of Mr. Tantowi Yahya as the new Perseroan yang baru, terhitung sejak tanggal 3 Juni Independent Commissioner of the Company, 2024. Perubahan ini diaktakan dengan akta No. 2 effective June 3, 2024. This change is notarized tanggal 3 Juni 2024 oleh Luh Gede Herryani, S.H., by Deed No. 2 dated June 3, 2024, by Luh Gede M.Kn, Notaris di Badung-Bali. Telah mendapat Herryani, S.H., M.Kn., Notary at Badung-Bali. evidence.directors: Board Of Directors Published on 6 Aug 2025 Ida Bagus Rai Budarsa – President Director As the founder of Hatten Wines and a pioneer in Indonesia’s wine industry, Ida Bagus Rai Budarsa has led the company from a family business producing traditional Balinese drinks to an award-winning wine producer. His deep knowledge of the local culture, hospitality industry, and international wine standards has shaped WINE into a trusted name both locally and abroad. Ketut Sumarwan – Director Ketut Sumarwan plays a vital role in managing the operational aspects of the business. With a background likely in finance, logistics, or production, he supports the execution of strategic initiatives, ensuring efficiency across the company’s supply chain, production facilities, and distribution channels. Board Of Commissioners Ida Ayu Somawati – Commissioner A professional with a strong background in compliance and risk management, Ida Ayu Somawati contributes to the supervisory role of the board. She works closely with other commissioners to monitor the company’s performance and uphold ethical standards. Ida Bagus Oka Kresna – President Commissioner With extensive experience in corporate governance and advisory, Ida Bagus Oka Kresna oversees the company’s strategic direction and ensures that the board's decisions align with shareholders’ interests and regulatory frameworks. His leadership helps maintain good corporate governance and long-term sustainability. Tantoni Yahya – Independent Commissioner Tantowi Yahya is a former Indonesian Ambassador to New Zealand, Samoa, and Tonga (2017–2021) and ex-member of the House of Representatives, with expertise in tourism, culture, and creative industries. He brings extensive governance experience and strategic insight to PT Hatten Bali Tbk, supporting oversight and market development initiatives. Source: Company and KSI Research www.kiwoom.co.id 5 KSI Research WINE – 1H25 Short Note Published on 8 Aug 2025 Team Published on 6 Aug 2025 Thomas Hadiwibowo (Pak Bowo) – Vineyard Manager Pak Bowo has overseen vineyard operations at Hatten since 1999, bringing more than 20 years of experience in grape cultivation. Originally from Nganjuk, East Java, and once an apple farmer, he transitioned into viticulture and now plays a central role in managing North Bali’s vineyards, which produce over 1,000 tonnes of grapes annually. His dedication extends beyond the workweek—he remains closely connected to the farming community, even spending weekends playing futsal with fellow vineyard workers. James Kalleske – Head of Winemaker Born in Australia’s famed Barossa Valley, James Kalleske brings a wealth of global winemaking expertise to Hatten Wines. Having learned under legendary winemaker Bob Cartwright, James previously worked in top wine regions such as Barossa, Margaret River, Yecla (Spain). Since joining Hatten, he has driven innovation through close collaboration with the R&D team, and was instrumental
evidence.commissioners: Board Of Commissioners Ida Ayu Somawati – Commissioner A professional with a strong background in compliance and risk management, Ida Ayu Somawati contributes to the supervisory role of the board. She works closely with other commissioners to monitor the company’s performance and uphold ethical standards. Ida Bagus Oka Kresna – President Commissioner With extensive experience in corporate governance and advisory, Ida Bagus Oka Kresna oversees the company’s strategic direction and ensures that the board's decisions align with shareholders’ interests and regulatory frameworks. His leadership helps maintain good corporate governance and long-term sustainability. Tantoni Yahya – Independent Commissioner Tantowi Yahya is a former Indonesian Ambassador to New Zealand, Samoa, and Tonga (2017–2021) and ex-member of the House of Representatives, with expertise in tourism, culture, and creative industries. He brings extensive governance experience and strategic insight to PT Hatten Bali Tbk, supporting oversight and market development initiatives. Source: Company and KSI Research www.kiwoom.co.id 5 KSI Research WINE – 1H25 Short Note Published on 8 Aug 2025 Team Published on 6 Aug 2025 Thomas Hadiwibowo (Pak Bowo) – Vineyard Manager Pak Bowo has overseen vineyard operations at Hatten since 1999, bringing more than 20 years of experience in grape cultivation. Originally from Nganjuk, East Java, and once an apple farmer, he transitioned into viticulture and now plays a central role in managing North Bali’s vineyards, which produce over 1,000 tonnes of grapes annually. His dedication extends beyond the workweek—he remains closely connected to the farming community, even spending weekends playing futsal with fellow vineyard workers. James Kalleske – Head of Winemaker Born in Australia’s famed Barossa Valley, James Kalleske brings a wealth of global winemaking expertise to Hatten Wines. Having learned under legendary winemaker Bob Cartwright, James previously worked in top wine regions such as Barossa, Margaret River, Yecla (Spain). Since joining Hatten, he has driven innovation through close collaboration with the R&D team, and was instrumental in the company earning the title of Asian Winery of the Year in 2017. Yeni Iramahayani – Winemaker Yeni, a Balinese native, joined Hatten in 2011 as a laboratory manager and has since risen to the role of Winemaker. With a degree in food technology, she was drawn to winemaking for its fusion of science and art. Her career has included visits to renowned Australian wine regions, and she has developed a refined palate under the mentorship of James Kalleske. Today, she plays a vital role in producing the Hatten, Two Islands, and Dragonfly ranges. Péter Gajdics – Winemaker Hailing from Hungary, Péter Gajdics adds international depth to Hatten’s winemaking team. With experience in historic wine regions across Hungary, Germany, New Zealand, Australia, England, and Turkey, Péter contributes a diverse skillset to the company. In Bali, his focus lies in qu

Boards of commissioner and Directors (Continued) Berdasarkan Surat Keputusan PT Hatten Bali Tbk Based on the Decree of PT Hatten Bali Tbk nomor 001/HB-DIR/I/2024 tentang pemberhentian number 001/HB-DIR/I/2024 concerning the dan pengangkatan Sekretaris Perusahaan tertanggal dismissal and appointment of the Corporate 8 Januari 2024. Memutuskan pemberhentian dengan Secretary dated January 8, 2024. Decided to hormat Ketut Sumarwan dan digantikan oleh Ni Putu dismiss with respect Ketut Sumarwan and was Devi Aryani. replaced by Ni Putu Devi Aryani. 31 Desember 2024/ 31 Desember 2023/ Desember 31, 2024
evidence.commissioners: Dewan Komisaris dan Direksi c. Boards of commissioner and Directors Berdasarkan Akta Notaris No. 2 tanggal 3 Juni 2024 Based on Notarial Deed No. 2 dated June 3, 2024 yang dibuat di hadapan Luh Gede Herryani. S.H., made before Luh Gede Herryani. S.H., M.kn. on M.kn. pada tanggal 31 Desember 2024 susunan Desember 31, 2024 the composition of the Board Direksi dan Komisaris Perseroan adalah sebagai of Directors and Commissioners of the Company berikut: is as follows: 31 Desember 2024/ December 31, 2024 Komisaris Commissioner Komisaris utama Ida Bagus Oka Kresna President commissioner Komisaris Ida Ayu Somawati Commissioner Komisaris Independen Tantowi Yahya Independent commissioner Direktur Director Direktur utama Ida Bagus Rai Budarsa President director Direktur Ketut Sumarwan Director Berdasarkan Akta Notaris No. 73 tanggal 29 Agustus Based on Notarial Deed No. 73 dated August 29, 2022 yang dibuat di hadapan Dr. Sugih Haryati. S.H., 2022 made before Dr. Sugih Haryati. S.H., M.kn. M.kn. pada tanggal 31 Desember 2023, susunan on December 31, 2023, the composition of the Direksi dan Komisaris Perseroan adalah sebagai Board of Directors and Commissioners of the berikut: Company is as follows: 31 Desember 2023/ December 31, 2023 Komisaris Commissioner Komisaris utama Ida Bagus Oka Kresna President commissioner Komisaris Ida Ayu Somawati Commissioner Komisaris Independen I Wayan Ramantha Independent commissioner Direktur Director Direktur utama Ida Bagus Rai Budarsa President director Direktur Ketut Sumarwan Director Pada Rapat Umum Pemegang Saham Tahunan At the Annual General Meeting of Shareholders tanggal 3 Juni 2024, para pemegang saham telah on June 3, 2024, the shareholders have approved menyetujui penegasan atas berakhirnya jabatan the confirmation of the termination of the position anggota Dewan Komisaris Independen Perseroan of the member of the Board of Independent dikarenakan meninggal dunia, dan selanjutnya para Commissioners of the Company due to his death, pemegang saham menyetujui penunjukan bapak and subsequently the shareholders approved the Tantowi Yahya sebagai Komisaris Independen appointment of Mr. Tantowi Yahya as the new Perseroan yang baru, terhitung sejak tanggal 3 Juni Independent Commissioner of the Company, 2024. Perubahan ini diaktakan dengan akta No. 2 effective June 3, 2024. This change is notarized tanggal 3 Juni 2024 oleh Luh Gede Herryani, S.H., by Deed No. 2 dated June 3, 2024, by Luh Gede M.Kn, Notaris di Badung-Bali. Telah mendapat Herryani, S.H., M.Kn., Notary at Badung-Bali. It pengesahan dari Menteri Hukum dan Hak Asasi has been approved by the Minister of Justice and Manusia Republik Indonesia No. AHU-AH.01
